title: ProofRecord
description: ExecutionProof authorization decision record with Ed25519 signature

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of decision issuance

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the governed payload (64-character hex string)

evidence_references.description: Array of URIs referencing supporting evidence for the decision

actor.description: Identity string of the decision-making authority or agent

execution_outcome.description: Actual execution result following the decision

review_path.description: Audit trail identifier for record review and compliance tracking

signature.description: Ed25519 signature (128-character hex string, 64 bytes). Present in signed records, absent during signing.

notes.canonicalization: RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalization Scheme, JCS) before signing
notes.signature_algorithm: Ed25519 over the canonical byte representation
notes.verification: Remove signature field, canonicalize remaining 7 fields via JCS, verify signature against canonical bytes
